title: Emartbuy Hot Pink Shredded Paper 200 grams – Soft Tissue Gift Filling for Hampers, Packaging & Crafting | Lightweight Crinkle Paper for Gift Boxes, Baskets, Parcels & Decorations
features: ⭐ PREMIUM SHREDDED TISSUE PAPER – Soft, lightweight and crafted from high-quality tissue paper designed to protect delicate items while enhancing your packaging presentation.
🎁 ENHANCES EVERY GIFT BOX – Perfect for filling empty spaces in hampers, gift baskets, subscription boxes, party favours, shipping parcels and retail packaging displays.
📦 STRONG PROTECTIVE CUSHIONING – Helps absorb shock and prevents movement during transit, keeping fragile items safe and reducing risk of damage.
🎨 MULTIPURPOSE FOR CRAFTING – Ideal for art projects, festive decorations, DIY crafts, floral arrangements, Easter baskets, birthdays and seasonal gifting.
📏 CONVENIENT 200G PACK – Lightweight, easy to use and provides generous coverage for multiple boxes or hampers. (Weight: 200g)
description: Give your gifts, hampers and packaging the perfect finishing touch with Emartbuy Hot Pink Shredded Paper – 200g. Made from soft, lightweight tissue paper, this shred adds both style and protective cushioning to any presentation. Whether you’re preparing luxury gift hampers, subscription boxes, festive parcels or retail product displays, this crinkle paper keeps products secure while looking beautifully arranged. Its versatile structure helps reduce movement inside boxes, preventing damage during shipping or handling. The rich Hot Pink colour adds an attractive visual finish, perfect for birthdays, weddings, Christmas, corporate gifting and more.
